raw: This is a physical pass that needs to be picked up at the library. You may pick it up at any time during library hours. Please check our website for library hours and closures as well as the zoos website for special event closures. This pass doesn't need to be returned. Pass admits 6 people to Franklin Park Zoo (Boston) or Stone Zoo (Stoneham). Discounted rate is $9 per adult; $6 per child. Free admission for children under 2.
